tools.name: draftPressRelease
tools.description: Draft a press release with title, body, optional embargo, and distribution list.

tools.name: generatePRContent
tools.description: Generate press release content from topic and key messages.

tools.description: Schedule press release distribution to a media list on a specific date.

tools.description: Track press release pickups across outlets with sentiment breakdown.
